channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sammy Sosa appears to acknowledge PED use, apologizes; Cubs welcome him back into fold
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sammy Sosa appeared to acknowledge using performance enhancing drugs during a career in which he hit more than 600 home runs, and the Chicago Cubs said they were ready to welcome back their former star.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RFK Stadium site provision removed from federal spending bill, a blow to the Commanders and NFL
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A provision to transfer the land that is the site of the old RFK Stadium from the federal government to the District of Columbia is no longer included in Congress' slimmed-down, short-term spending bill that lawmakers are racing to pass before a government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: DC Mayor corrects misinformation over RFK Stadium land after celebrating start of arena renovations
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — District of Columbia Mayor Muriel Bowser tried Thursday to correct misinformation amplified online by Elon Musk about how Congress’ end-of-year spending bill will impact efforts for a potential new stadium for the NFL’s Washington Commanders.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: IOC publishes manifestos of 7 candidates running to be president and lead Olympics
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — The seven candidates running for International Olympic Committee president had their manifestos published on Thursday, and one is offering to take just half of the eight-year mandate on offer and stand again in 2029.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox change name of ballpark to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have changed the name of Guaranteed Rate Field to Rate Field. The name change is because the sponsor of the ballpark, Guaranteed Rate, changed their name to Rate.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Runnin' Utes roll past Florida A&M, 89-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's last home game of 2024 was a memorable one, as the Utes cruised past Florida A&M, 89-59. Mike Sharavjamts and Mason Madsen each scored 15 points off the bench to lead a balanced Utah attack. The Utes bench scored 57 points, while the starters scored 32.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Soccer: Our Lady of Peace 6, Patrick Henry 3
item.description: Holiday Jubilee tournament in girls soccer OLP facing off against Patrick Henry. OLP took home the 6-3 victory.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: UK hockey team retires Adam Johnson's No. 47 to honor player who died after neck cut
item.description:
Adam Johnson made as big an impression off the ice as he did on it for the Nottingham Panthers.
The U.K. hockey team officially retired Johnson's No. 47 jersey on Saturday in tribute to the American forward who died after his neck was cut by an opponent’s skate during a game over a year ago.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dosunmu and Giddey lead the Bulls past the struggling Hornets 109-95
item.description: Josh Giddey had 17 points, nine rebounds and seven assists, and the Chicago Bulls beat the struggling Charlotte Hornets 109-95 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
